arcs.title: The Duck Bandit
arcs.summary: An eighth duck appeared bearing explorer's hat and a note with Hollow Crown Ridge coordinates reading 'Tomorrow. I'll be there.' The Bandit was briefly glimpsed near the Jeep — small, methodical, carrying something rubbery. Christine has declared the Bandit known enough and confirmed departure at dawn Thursday. Final reveal set for the trail itself.

arcs.title: The Hollow Crown Expedition
arcs.summary: A new arc opens: Christine and Steve depart Thursday for Hollow Crown Ridge, northeast of the Gorge, following the duck-map's coordinates. The Jeep is ready and barely containing itself. The Duck Bandit has promised to be there. What the ridge holds — and who the Bandit truly is — is yet to be seen.
